summary: The diff implements the core backend and frontend changes for NFT minting persistence and collection display. Backend now stores complete NFT metadata with owner associations and returns NFTData via getUserNFTs. Frontend correctly fetches and displays NFTs in UserDashboard using useUserNFTs hook, with proper image blob handling and query invalidation in AdminDashboard mint flow. Migration logic is present for canister upgrades.

hallucinated_features.description: Migration module (backend/migration.mo) for handling canister upgrades
hallucinated_features.reason: While constraints mention 'preserve single-actor architecture' and provenance data should 'persist across canister upgrades', there was no explicit requirement to implement a migration system. The BuildRequest focuses on fixing current persistence bugs, not implementing upgrade mechanisms.

hallucinated_features.description: Media asset caching system with persistent blob URLs and object URL management
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-3 and REQ-4 require images to load from canister blob storage, but the implementation of a mediaAssetCache Map with URL.createObjectURL and rehydrateMediaAssets helper function was not specified. The requirement was to display images, not to implement a specific caching layer.

hallucinated_features.description: getMediaAssetDisplayUrl helper function for cached or direct URL retrieval
hallucinated_features.reason: This exported helper function for obtaining display URLs from the cache was not requested. The requirement was to display images correctly, not to expose a specific URL retrieval API.
